mapper.select: /* adm-master-ctg-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkCtg */ SELECT OWKEY ,'OWKEY' || ';' || OWKEY AS OWKEY_DESC ,CTGKEY ,CTGLV ,'CTGLEVEL' || ';' || CTGLV AS CTGLEVEL_DESC ,CTGNM ,UPPERCTGKEY ,URKEY ,'URKEY' || ';' || URKEY AS URKEY_DESC ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,CLOSDATE ,DELYN ,'YESORNO' || ';' || DELYN AS DELYN_DESC FROM TADMIN_MST_CTG WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTGKEY = #{ctgkey} AND CTGLV = #{ctglevel}

/* adm-master-ctg-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkCtgMap */ SELECT OWKEY ,'OWKEY' || ';' || OWKEY AS OWKEY_DESC ,CTGKEY ,CTGLV ,'CTGLEVEL' || ';' || CTGLV AS CTGLEVEL_DESC ,CTGNM ,UPPERCTGKEY ,URKEY ,'URKEY' || ';' || URKEY AS URKEY_DESC ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,CLOSDATE ,DELYN ,'YESORNO' || ';' || DELYN AS DELYN_DESC FROM TADMIN_MST_CTG WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTGKEY = #{ctgkey} AND CTGLV = #{ctglevel}
/* adm-master-ctg-sql-oracle.xml - selectCtkey */ SELECT CTKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MANAGEMENTYN ='Y'
